revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初六]][[zh:六月初六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初六]][[zh:六月初六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初六]][[zh:六月初六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初六]][[zh:六月初六]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 6|qq=June 6}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 6''' is the 6th day of the month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Xianqing|ja|顕慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xianqing|1=Xianqing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q855014}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|660|en|660|qid=Q30308|lt=660|1=660}} {{ill|July 18|en|July 18|qid=Q2730|lt=July 18|1=July 18}}) – [[:en:Baekje|Baekje]] was destroyed by a combined force of Tang and Silla. * {{ill|Kōan (Kamakura period)|en|Kōan (Kamakura period)|qid=Q389180|lt=Kōan|1=Kōan (Kamakura period)}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1281|en|1281|qid=Q5537|lt=1281|1=1281}} {{ill|June 23|en|June 23|qid=Q2668|lt=June 23|1=June 23}}) – During the 【弘安の役】, the former Mongol forces re-invaded Kyushu. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|qid=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} {{ill|July 21|en|July 21|qid=Q2727|lt=July 21|1=July 21}}) – The Chōshū Domain, led by {{ill|Takasugi Shinsaku|en|Takasugi Shinsaku|qid=Q700310|lt=Takasugi Shinsaku|1=Takasugi Shinsaku}} and others, formed the 【奇兵隊】. == Births == * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji|1=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|qid=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|qid=Q2698|lt=July 4|1=July 4}}) – {{ill|Iwatani Konami|ja|巖谷小波|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwatani Konami|1=Sazanami Iwaya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q19366455}}, a writer of fairy tales and haiku poet (died {{ill|1933|en|1933|qid=Q18726|lt=1933|1=1933}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji|1=Meiji era}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|July 23|en|July 23|qid=Q2722|lt=July 23|1=July 23}}) – {{ill|Tsunesaburō Makiguchi|en|Tsunesaburō Makiguchi|qid=Q1196300|lt=Makiguchi Tsunazō|1=Tsunesaburō Makiguchi}}, the first president of the Sōka Gakkai (died {{ill|1944|en|1944|qid=Q5268|lt=1944|1=1944}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Chōgen|en|Chōgen|qid=Q1193557|lt=Chōgen|1=Chōgen}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1031|en|1031|qid=Q19315|lt=1031|1=1031}} {{ill|July 28|en|July 28|qid=Q2718|lt=July 28|1=July 28}}) – {{ill|Taira no Tadatsune|en|Taira no Tadatsune|qid=Q1105844|lt=Taira Tadanori|1=Taira no Tadatsune}}, a military commander and progenitor of the Chiba clan (born {{ill|967|en|967|qid=Q23699|lt=967|1=967}}). * {{ill|Kanpō|en|Kanpō|qid=Q1145798|lt=Kanpō|1=Kanpō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1742|en|1742|qid=Q7575|lt=1742|1=1742}} {{ill|July 7|en|July 7|qid=Q2694|lt=July 7|1=July 7}}) – {{ill|Hayano Tomobito|ja|早野巴人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayano Tomobito|1=Hayano Hajin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11511579}}, a haiku poet and mentor to Yosa Buson (born {{ill|1676|en|1676|qid=Q7628|lt=1676|1=1676}}).
== Commemorations == * Before the adoption of the solar calendar, a tradition developed on Lunisolar June 6 where children began their artistic training. * During the Bakumatsu period, Lunisolar June 6 was regarded as the day when children started school at local terakoya.<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://kigyoka.com/news/magazine/magazine_20171120.html|title=基礎教育を担った寺子屋／日本経済新聞社参与 吉村久夫|date=2017-11-20|accessdate=2020-04-29|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-03-09|qq=}}</ref>
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|5|6|7|5|6|7|6|0606|qq=}}
== References == <references />

[[ar:June 6 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:六月初六]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:六月初六]] {{wikidata link|Q839915}} [[Category:Days 6 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar June]] [[Category:Taian]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
